allow: Bash(rm demos.db && node -e "const { scanDemos, getAllDemos } = require\('./database'\); scanDemos\(\); const demos = getAllDemos\(\); console.log\('Scanned demos:'\); demos.forEach\(d => console.log\('- ' + d.name + ': ' + \(d.tech_stack || 'N/A'\)\)\);")
